name: Wolfhouse Guest Add-on Request - Dry Run

meta.description: Stage 8.8.31 dry-run workflow. INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Luna guest add-on path: preview -> create (with idempotency_key) -> draft reply with Stripe link or record-only message. Dry-run guard: workflow JSON dry_run:true / live_send_enabled:false (no $env; staging blocks env access in node expressions). X-Luna-Bot-Token via n8n Header Auth credential Luna Bot Internal Token (staging) — bind at import, never hardcoded. No graph.facebook.com. No Twilio. No WhatsApp send. No api.stripe.com.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "dry_run_guard_blocked", "detail": "dry_run is not true; refusing guest add-on dry-run", "whatsapp_sent": false, "live_send_blocked": true }

assignments.name: note
assignments.value: DryRun: preview returned ask/handoff — create skipped. No WhatsApp send.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  client_slug:      $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.client_slug,
  booking_code:     $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.booking_code,
  guest_phone:      $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.guest_phone,
  service_type:     $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.service_type,
  service_date:     $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.service_date,
  quantity:         $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.quantity,
  payment_choice:   $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.payment_choice,
  source:           $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.source,
  confirm:          true,
  idempotency_key:  $('Code - Parse Guest Addon Request').first().json.idempotency_key
}) }}
